briefs.title: BC Drinking Water Rules Updated: Small Private Water Systems Get New Classification
briefs.summary: BC amended its Drinking Water Protection Regulation to create a new category called a 'specified domestic small system' — a small water system with fewer than 5 private home connections. This new category changes which rules apply to those systems, separating them from other small systems under the regulation.
briefs.action_required: Check if your property or business operates a small private water system with fewer than 5 home connections — new rules may apply to you.
briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Construction & Development, Agriculture
